project: KnowFlow AI RAG and tool design
core_chain: store vectors in Chroma or local vector backend
build prompt with history and references

tools.name: knowledge_search
tools.purpose: search related chunks from selected knowledge base

tools.name: session_memory_search
tools.purpose: read current session history for continuation

tools.name: document_summary
tools.purpose: summarize selected document or retrieved chunks

tools.name: markdown_draft_generate
tools.purpose: generate project notes, study summaries, or markdown drafts

rule: If no knowledge base is selected, normal chat should not force RAG. If a knowledge base is selected, retrieval context is enabled automatically.
